name: 锯齿爪刀（★） | 枯焦之色
nameZh: 锯齿爪刀（★） | 枯焦之色
descriptionEn: This ivory-handled karambit features brass rivets and saw-tooth ridges, so it cuts on the way in, and tears on the way out. It has been spray-painted in a sun-dappled pattern. The Phoenix is not a symbol of destruction... it's a symbol of rebirth - Valeria Jenner, Revolutionary
descriptionZh: 这把象牙把手的爪子刀搭配了铜钉和锯齿刀背，以达到进刀切割、出刀撕裂的效果。 这把武器被漆上了阳光斑驳图案。 “凤凰”不是毁灭的象征… 恰恰相反，它象征着重生 - 革命者瓦莱里娅.琴纳
